info.title: HIV.C PrEP visit API
info.description: This tab describes the data that may be collected during the pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) or post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) workflow (HIV.C)

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVCPrEPvisit
get.description: This endpoint serves the JSON Schema definition for the Logical Model StructureDefinition-HIVCPrEPvisit.

StructureDefinition-HIVCPrEPvisit.title: HIV.C PrEP visit
StructureDefinition-HIVCPrEPvisit.description: This tab describes the data that may be collected during the pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) or post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) workflow (HIV.C)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVCPrEPvisit logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVCPrEPvisit logical model
JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE1

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE1

reasonForPrepVisit.description: Client's reason for the prevention visit

threeMonthPrepVisit.description: Client is visiting for the recommended 3-month pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) visit

contactWithAndSuspectedExposureToHiv.description: The client had suspected or known exposure to HIV

dateTimeOfSuspectedExposureToHiv.description: When the suspect exposure to HIV took place

currentlyOnPrep.description: The client is currently taking PrEP. Oral pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) of HIV is the use of ARV drugs by people who are not infected with HIV to block the acquisition of HIV.

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE11

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE11

prepDosingType.description: Way in which pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) is taken (daily or event-driven)

usedEventDrivenPrepForAtRiskExposuresOve.description: Client reports taking ED-PrEP for at risk exposures over a 3-month period

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE17

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE17

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE24

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE24

experienceWithPrep.description: The client's experience in taking PrEP

prepStartDate.description: The date on which the client started or restarted pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP)

datePrepStopped.description: Date client stopped taking pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP)

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE31

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE31

pepHistory.description: The client's history in taking post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP) for HIV prevention

datesOfPastPepUse.description: Dates when the client previously used post-exposure prophylaxis (PEP)

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE36

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.C.DE36. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

signsOfSubstantialRiskOfHivInfection.description: Signs the client is at a substantial risk of HIV infection

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE41

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE41

pregnancyIntentionInSerodiscordantPartne.description: Client's intention or desire in the next year to either become pregnant or prevent a future pregnancy (in serodiscordant partnerships)

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE46

acuteHivInfectionSymptoms.description: Symptoms that could suggest an acute HIV infection

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE55

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE55

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.C.DE55. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

sexPartnerHivTreatmentStatus.description: Treatment adherence of client's sex partner for partners that are HIV-positive

suitableForPrep.description: The client is suitable for PrEP

offeredPrep.description: After being evaluated as suitable for PrEP, the client was offered PrEP

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE63

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.C.DE63. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

screeningsAndDiagnosticsForPrepUsers.description: Listing of tests for clients on or starting pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) that may be recommended or should be considered

serumCreatinineTestDate.description: Test serum creatinine to identify pre-existing renal disease (estimated creatinine clearance less than 60 ml/min)

serumCreatinineTestResult.description: Test serum creatinine to identify pre-existing renal disease (estimated creatinine clearance less than 60 ml/min).

dateMedicationsDispensed.description: Date the client was dispensed medications

dateMedicationsPrescribed.description: Date the client was prescribed medications

volumeOfPrepProductPrescribedDispensed.description: Volume of PrEP product the client was prescribed or dispensed (for example, number of pills, number of devices)

datePepPrescribed.description: Date the client was prescribed PEP

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.C.DE101. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

estimatedCreatinineClearance.description: Estimated creatinine clearance of the client returned from lab in mL/min

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.C.DE107

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.C.DE107

sexFactorForEstimatingCreatinineClearanc.description: Value used for gender for calculating creatinine clearance if required. For transgender populations, the sex at birth is used in the Cockcroft-Gault equation if the person is not using hormone therapy; among transgender populations using hormone therapy for more than three months, the current gender can be used.

estimatedCreatinineClearanceCockcroftGau.description: If the laboratory does not have the capacity to estimate creatinine clearance, the provider can use the Cockcroft–Gault equation to calculate estimated creatinine clearance based on measured serum creatinine, the client’s sex at birth, age and estimated lean body weight.

dateOfSampleCollection.description: Date when the specimen was collected

contraindicationsToPrepUsage.description: Listing of contraindications to pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP)

otherAllergyOrContraindicationToAMedicin.description: Client has another allergy or contraindication to a medicine in the pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) regimen (specify)

prescribedPrepAtInitialVisit.description: Client was prescribed pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) on a first visit

numberOfDaysPrescribed.description: Days of medication client has been prescribed
